name: Shattuck Labs, Inc.
business: Shattuck Labs is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing monoclonal and bispecific Death Receptor 3 (DR3) blocking antibodies for inflammatory and immune-mediated diseases. Its lead product candidate, SL-325, is designed to block the DR3/TL1A pathway for conditions such as Crohn's disease.
sellsTo: Patients with inflammatory and immune-mediated diseases

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering the development of potentially first-in-class monoclonal and bispecific Death Receptor 3 (DR3) blocking antibodies for the treatment of patients with inflammatory and immune-mediated diseases.

catalysts.event: Completion of Phase 1 clinical trial for SL-325
catalysts.sentence: We expect this Phase 1 clinical trial to be completed in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 2 clinical trial for SL-325 in Crohn's disease
catalysts.sentence: We expect to initiate a randomized, placebo-controlled Phase 2 clinical trial evaluating SL-325 in patients with Crohn’s Disease (CD) in the third quarter of 2026.
